---
title: COVID-19 Tracking Project Data Dictionary
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## The COVID-19 Data

This project uses data from the [The COVID Tracking Project](https://covidtracking.com/):

### Variables: `covid_state_pop.csv`

`state`: Two-letter abbreviation for the state or territory. 

`population`: Population of the state.
